ocr_findings.description: Answer key line at bottom contains formatting artifacts: 'е•ЏйЎЊ5-1 г‚¤гЂЂ^{}[] е•ЏйЎЊ5-2 г‚ўгЂЂ^{}[] е•ЏйЎЊ5-3 г‚¤гЂЂ^{}[] е•ЏйЎЊ5-4 г‚ў' вЂ” the '^{}[]' strings appear between answers. These are rendering artifacts with no semantic impact on content.

reviewer_notes: Four exam questions (5-1 to 5-4) on information strategy, enterprise search, DFD/BPR modeling methods. All question stems and four answer choices per question accurately captured. Minor formatting artifacts appear in the answer key line but do not affect question or answer content.
